page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmg7.32xlarge is an x86_64 architecture bare-metal style instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 128 dedicated physical cores with 128 vCPUs, utilizing Intel Xeon 8369B processors operating at a base frequency of 2.9 GHz. The system is configured with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio, meaning hyperthreading is disabled, providing dedicated execution resources per vCPU. It includes 512.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance does not include local storage, requiring network-attached storage solutions for data persistence. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated physical core allocation and high resource density position this instance for large-scale enterprise deployments where resource contention must be avoided, offering high compute density without the overhead of multi-threading.

The ecs.ebmg7.32xlarge is designed for workloads requiring high parallel processing capabilities and predictable CPU performance. Suitable workloads include large-scale web serving, enterprise application hosting, high-performance computing tasks, distributed analytics, and database management systems that rely on external storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmg7.32xlarge is a high-capacity, general-purpose instance featuring 128 dedicated physical cores and 128 vCPUs powered by Intel Xeon 8369B processors running at 2.9 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides 512.0 GB of system memory, maintaining a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It operates with hyperthreading disabled, ensuring dedicated execution threads for predictable performance. The instance lacks local storage, relying entirely on external storage solutions, and features a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps. This hardware profile is qualitatively cost-efficient for enterprise-scale deployments requiring high resource density and zero CPU contention. It is suited for demanding workloads such as large-scale web serving, enterprise application hosting, distributed data processing, and database management systems.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmg7.32xlarge is a KVM-based instance with 128 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 512 GB RAM, and 64 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for high-density enterprise workloads.

tagline: A high-density dedicated core instance featuring balanced memory allocation and high-speed networking for demanding enterprise workloads.

512.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core.
